mapper.select: SELECT /*+ INDEX_ASC(A PPS_AGENT_STM_SELF_IDX1) */ TO_CHAR(BILL_MONTH, 'YYYY-MM') BILL_MONTH, AGENT_ID, OP_OPEN_AMT, OP_RCG_AMT, OP_PPS, OP_OPEN_CNT, OP_CAN_CNT, NVL(OP_OPEN_CNT, 0) - NVL(OP_CAN_CNT, 0) OP_REAL_CNT, PSD_CNT, PSD_AMT, PSD_PPS, MNG_CNT, MNG_AMT, MNG_PPS, PRM_CNT, PRM_AMT, PRM_PPS, RF_CNT, RF_AMT, RF_PPS, LAST_AMT, LAST_PPS, ETC_AMT, ETC_PPS, NVL(OP_PPS, 0) + NVL(PSD_PPS, 0) + NVL(MNG_PPS, 0) + NVL(PRM_PPS, 0) + NVL(RF_PPS, 0) + NVL(LAST_PPS, 0) + NVL(ETC_PPS, 0) TOT_PPS, NVL(OP_OPEN_AMT, 0) + NVL(OP_RCG_AMT, 0) + NVL(PSD_AMT, 0) + NVL(MNG_AMT, 0) + NVL(PRM_AMT, 0) + NVL(RF_AMT, 0) + NVL(LAST_AMT, 0) + NVL(ETC_AMT, 0) TOT_AMT, TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REG_DT FROM PPS_AGENT_STM_SELF A WHERE AGENT_ID = #{loginAgentId} AND BILL_MONTH >= TO_DATE('20180101', 'YYYYMMDD')
